items.weekend: When booking equipment for the weekend (Sat-Sun), the client may pick it up on Friday from 14:00 to 20:00 and return it on Monday from 11:00 to 14:00, paying for only 2 rental days instead of 3.
items.prepayment: Booking is made with prepayment. The prepayment is non-refundable if the client cancels the order.
items.planAhead: Plan your adventures in advance by booking equipment for 2 or more days. For spontaneous trips, one-day rental without pre-booking is available depending on stock at 19 Gen. Aslan Abashidze Street.
items.expeditionBonus: When booking equipment for ascents or multi-day hikes from 7 days with the Adjara Peak flag and a story mention, the client gets 2 free rental days for the road. That means paying for 5 days instead of 7.
items.paymentDay: Payment for rental is made on the day the equipment is issued.
items.noDeposit: Equipment is provided without a deposit.
items.overdue: If the agreed rental period is exceeded without notice, the client pays double the rental price for each overdue day.
items.earlyNotice: If you want to return the equipment earlier, please let us know in advance.
items.noRecalculation: If the equipment is returned earlier than planned, no recalculation is made.
items.cleanReturn: Equipment is issued dry and clean and must be returned in the same condition. If returned wet or dirty, a penalty equal to one rental day is charged.
items.damage: In case of damage during the rental period, the client covers the repair cost.
items.loss: In case of loss or irreparable damage, the client compensates the full market value of the equipment specified in the agreement.
items.weekendReturn: Equipment taken for the weekend must be returned strictly no later than 12:00 on Monday.
items.respect: Please respect our work and handle the rented equipment with care.
